description: Fiscal document(s) in Arabic script. Bifolio. One entry on each page of recto. The right side reports on the transport of something (probably state produce or tax in kind) at the state warehouse (shūn al-maʿmūra). Might have to do with sugar. Apart from the format and script, we know it is state-related from terms such as al-maʿmūra, al-sulṭāniyya, and iṭlāq. Also mentions "al-ujra min māl al-diwān". The Verso is almost blank apart from a few signatures on top of the lefthand page. Needs examination.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
